description: A defensive, educational, harness-neutral library of 100 agentic tool-use skills for Cognitive Security and analytic tradecraft (Structured Analytic Techniques, source verification, deception detection, critical review), runnable identically under Claude Code, Codex, and Hermes, with a registry, an AGEINT educational upstream, and machine-checkable conformance.
title: CogSecSkills: Multiharness Agentic Skills for Cognitive Security
